const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73292884 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73292884 --event evt-petition-disposition; rg --files data/cases/scotus/73292884 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find record -maxdepth 3 -type f -print 2>/dev/null | sort; find . -path '*/record/context.json' -o -path '*/record/documents.json' -o -path '*/snapshots/*.json' | sort | head -200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find data/cases/scotus/73292884 -type f -print | sort; sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73292884/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml; sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73292884/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json; sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73292884/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73292884/record/documents/documents.json; sed -n '1,220p' data/cases/scotus/73292884/record/documents/questions-presented.txt; sed -n '1,360p' data/cases/scotus/73292884/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"Statement of the Case|Procedural History|Reasons for Granting|^I\\.|^II\\.|^III\\.|Conclusion|dissent|circuit|split|major purpose|earmark\" data/cases/scotus/73292884/record/documents/petition.txt | head -160; sed -n '360,900p' data/cases/scotus/73292884/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert|Segment base rate|relist|CVSG|Tenth|Paid|2025|2024|2023|2022\" metrics/statpack.md | head -240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,190p' metrics/statpack.md; rg -n 'salience|fee|Paid|paid|Tenth|ca10|10th' metrics/statpack.md metrics/statpack.json | head -220","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json; jq '.. | objects | select(.term? == \"2025\")' metrics/statpack.json | head -260","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq '.terms' metrics/statpack.json | sed -n '1,420p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|case law|citation|opinion|docket/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description));
text(matches);

const [a,b,c] = await Promise.all([
  tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"Rio Grande Foundation v. Oliver",court:["ca10"],filed_before:"2026-07-17",fields:["id","caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","court_citation_string","snippet"],num_results:5}),
  tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"Americans for Prosperity Foundation v. Bonta",court:["scotus"],fields:["id","caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet"],num_results:5}),
  tools.mcp

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"Rio Grande Foundation v. Oliver",court:["ca10"],filed_after:"2025-09-01",filed_before:"2025-09-15",fields:["absolute_url","caseName","dateFiled","citation","cluster_id","docketNumber","judge","panel_names","posture","procedural_history","syllabus","opinions"],num_results:3});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) c.type === "image" ? image(c) : c.type === "text" ? text(c.text) : null;

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:11135093,fields:["id","type","html_with_citations"]});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) c.type === "image" ? image(c) : c.type === "text" ? text(c.text) : null;

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"campaign finance donor disclosure issue advocacy electioneering communications \"Americans for Prosperity Foundation\" narrow tailoring",filed_after:"2021-07-01",filed_before:"2026-07-17",order_by:"score desc",fields:["absolute_url","caseName","dateFiled","citation","court_citation_string","opinions"],num_results:15});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) c.type === "image" ? image(c) : c.type === "text" ? text(c.text) : null;

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n -i \"split|conflict|other circuit|courts of appeals|lower courts|nationwide|confusion|disagreement\" data/cases/scotus/73292884/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '900,1335p' data/cases/scotus/73292884/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ; mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73292884/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000});
text(r.output);
